posts.author: sourabh_humbarwadi
posts.community: Krishca Ltd : A SME offering steel strapping Solution
posts.text: Krishca has bought a 50.05% stake in Manda Stainless worth 7.5 crore but it’s networth is Rs 42,594 and turnover info last year was NA, 2024/25-Rs 2,18,457 and 2023/24 NA.. Has anyone analysed why did Krishca buy the stake and most importantly why did it pay 7.5 crore?
